hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push --force'; then echo '❌ RED LINE 4: Force push is forbidden. Use git revert instead.' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo '⚠️  Pre-push: Run /ship checklist. Build must pass (RED LINE 5).'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git reset --hard'; then echo '⚠️  YELLOW: git reset --hard is destructive. Consider git stash or git revert instead.'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'npm install |yarn add |pnpm add '; then echo '⚠️  GUARDRAIL: New dependency. Check: can antd, MUI, or existing deps do this? Add to transpilePackages if needed.'; fi
FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'order-calculator|payments'; then echo '⚠️  YELLOW LINE 8: Payment code modified — verify price math (paise!) and signature validation.'; fi
FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'libs/auth'; then echo '⚠️  YELLOW LINE 7: Shared auth lib modified — this affects ALL 11 apps. Verify auth still works.'; fi
FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'libs/'; then echo '⚠️  YELLOW LINE 7: Shared library modified — changes ripple to all apps. Test broadly.'; fi
FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'vercel.json'; then echo '⚠️  Vercel routing config modified — verify subdomain routing still works for all apps.'; fi
FILE="$TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'next.config'; then echo '⚠️  App config modified — check basePath, transpilePackages, and env vars.'; fi
